rankings.title: World Handicap System
rankings.description: Rankings on KHARAGOLF use the World Handicap System (WHS). Your handicap index evolves with every submitted round.
rankings.signInToView: Sign in to view your ranking history
rankings.noHistory:
No ranking history yet
Submit rounds to build your index

chooseTournamentSubtitle: Select a tournament above to view the live leaderboard, tee times, and chat.
noScoresSubtitle: The hole-by-hole tracker will populate as scores come in.
noDocumentsSubtitle: No documents have been published for this event.
noPhotosSubtitle: Approved tournament photos will appear here.
signInToViewChat: Please sign in to view the tournament chat.
chatNotAvailableSubtitle: The tournament chat room is not enabled yet.
noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Be the first to say something!
noTeeTimesSubtitle: The draw hasn't been published yet. Check back soon.
noScoresLeaderboardSubtitle: Scores appear here as players submit them.

follows.title: Followed players
follows.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage spectator follows and notification preferences.
follows.emptyHint: You aren't following anyone yet. Pick a player or a tee group below to start receiving live highlights.
follows.noPlayers: No players in this tournament yet.

testPush.title: Preview a notification
testPush.subtitle: Send yourself a sample push in {{language}}
testPush.sentBody: Check your notifications to see how spectator alerts will look in your language.
testPush.noDeviceBody: We couldn't find a device for your account. Open the app on the device where you want notifications, then try again. Here's how the alert would have read:
testPush.rateLimitedBody: Please wait about {{seconds}} seconds before sending another test notification.
testPush.failedBody: Something went wrong while sending your test push. Please try again.
